productName: Honey Stixx - 1pk - Flavored Infused Preroll - Blueberry Muffin - Hybrid - 0.75g
description: A hybrid infused blunt built around Blueberry Muffin and enhanced with extract, blended in for a smooth, even burn and an elevated experience. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of butter, blueberry, and vanilla, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
